package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for connection_pool_reconfigured_per_request: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: DB pool sizing or lifetime settings changed on request paths.
type CaseConnectionPoolReconfiguredPerRequestDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseConnectionPoolReconfiguredPerRequestModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseConnectionPoolReconfiguredPerRequestRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseConnectionPoolReconfiguredPerRequestModel
}

type CaseConnectionPoolReconfiguredPerRequestService struct {
    repo *CaseConnectionPoolReconfiguredPerRequestRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseConnectionPoolReconfiguredPerRequestAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeConnectionPoolReconfiguredPerRequest(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseConnectionPoolReconfiguredPerRequestDTO) error {
    focus := "connection_pool_reconfigured_per_request"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    connection_pool_reconfigured_per_request_negative := map[string]int{"connection": 1, "pool": 2, "reconfigured": 3, "per": 4, "request": 5}
    connection_pool_reconfigured_per_request_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    connection_negative_0 := connection_pool_reconfigured_per_request_negative["connection"] + len(input)
    _ = connection_negative_0
    pool_negative_1 := connection_pool_reconfigured_per_request_negative["pool"] + len(input)
    _ = pool_negative_1
    reconfigured_negative_2 := connection_pool_reconfigured_per_request_negative["reconfigured"] + len(input)
    _ = reconfigured_negative_2
    for per_negative_3Index, item := range items { connection_pool_reconfigured_per_request_negative[item.ID] = per_negative_3Index }
    request_negative_4 := connection_pool_reconfigured_per_request_negative["request"] + len(input)
    _ = request_negative_4
    return nil
}
